purpose: Prevent confusing diagnostic near-miss counts with actual market opportunities.

count_definitions.candidate_count: Complete shadow candidate logged for observation.
count_definitions.diagnostic_record_count: All rows explaining why something did not become a candidate.
count_definitions.unique_market_near_miss_event_count: Unique live/runtime market events that are truly near a candidate path.
count_definitions.blocker_diagnostic_record_count: Rows about blocker or policy veto diagnostics.
count_definitions.instrumentation_gap_record_count: Rows where upstream did not emit a precise reason.
